name: Vendor Conference
description: For calls with vendors or partners covering products, pricing, and roadmap.

sections.title: Meeting Metadata
sections.instruction: State the date, vendor/partner name, and the purpose of the call.

sections.title: Attendees
sections.instruction: List attendees from both sides with their roles

sections.title: Products/Services Discussed
sections.instruction: Summarize which products, services, or solutions the vendor presented or discussed.

sections.title: Pricing & Commercial Terms
sections.instruction: Capture pricing, discounts, licensing terms, or contract details discussed, using exact figures stated. If none came up, say so explicitly.

sections.title: Roadmap & Upcoming Releases
sections.instruction: Summarize any product roadmap, upcoming features, or release timelines the vendor shared.

sections.title: Support & Escalation Process
sections.instruction: Note anything discussed about support channels, SLAs, or escalation paths.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List commitments from both sides with owner and due date, including the speaker's own first-person commitments owned by "Me".
